name: Customer name
description: Name of the customer, client, company, or organization

name: Sample ID
description: Unique sample, specimen, or test piece identifier

name: Part number
description: Customer part number, article number, component number, or Teilnummer

name: Specimen thickness
description: Thickness of the specimen, often named thickness, Dicke, thickness_mm, or t

name: Specimen width
description: Width of the specimen, often named width, Breite, width_mm, or b
